name: Harengon
summary: Harengons originated in the Feywild, where they spoke Sylvan and embodied the spirit of freedom and travel. In time, these rabbitfolk hopped into other worlds, bringing the fey realm’s exuberance with them and learning new languages as they went.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: You are Medium or Small. You choose the size when you select this race.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: Your character can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character. ThePlayer’s Handbookoffers a list of languages to choose from. The DM is free to modify that list for a campaign.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Increase one ability score by 2, and increase a different one by 1, or increase three different scores by 1.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: You can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character.

coreTraits.name: Hare-Trigger
coreTraits.summary: You can add your proficiency bonus to your initiative rolls.

coreTraits.name: Leporine Senses
coreTraits.summary: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

coreTraits.name: Lucky Footwork
coreTraits.summary: When you fail a Dexterity saving throw, you can use your reaction to roll a d4 and add it to the save, potentially turning the failure into a success. You can't use this reaction if you're prone or your speed is 0.

coreTraits.name: Rabbit Hop
coreTraits.summary: As a bonus action, you can jump a number of feet equal to five times your proficiency bonus, without provoking opportunity attacks. You can use this trait only if your speed is greater than 0. You can use it a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

coreTraits.name: Life Span
coreTraits.summary: Harengons have a life span of about a century.
